# Code Anchors: Nexus Pipeline

- `.claude/commands/nxs.setup.md` — the setup stage: bootstrap ground truth and product context.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.epic.md` — the epic stage: intent to right-sized epic and filed stories.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.hld.md` — the high-level-design stage: the focused decision record.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.analyze.md` — the analyze stage: implementation-conformance gate, reading committed scratch as soft context.
- `.claude/commands/nxs.close.md` — the close stage: close record into the queue and issue closure, mining and retaining committed scratch.
